The ODSVariable class¶

class ODSVariable(Observation)¶

The ODVariable class inherits from semperpy.observations.observation.Observation to hold an array of values extracted from a netcdf variable.

Public Methods¶

ODSVariable(name,file):
Parameters:
  • name (string) – name of the netcdf variable
  • file (string) – a netCDF4.Dataset object

Initializes the object.

values():

returns the values extracted from the netcdf variable using the private method readVariable.

Private Methods¶

readVariable(name,file):
Parameters:
  • name (string) – name of the netcdf variable
  • file (string) – a netCDF4.Dataset object

Loads the variable using the object file. If the variable has a missing_value attribute a masked array is created otherwise a numpy array is created. If the attributes scale_factor and add_offset exist, the array is scaled and offset.
